phases.name: Enable Core TELOS Governance
phases.description: Fix the fundamental issue preventing TELOS governance from functioning - interventions are disabled and PA is hardcoded instead of extracted.
steps: Enable interventions in state_manager.py (change enable_interventions=False to True at line 408)
Test that UnifiedGovernanceSteward is actually being called on each turn
Add telemetry logging to track when interventions fire
Verify intervention logic is working with simple test case
Document intervention triggering conditions and thresholds

phases.name: Implement Real PA Extraction
phases.description: Replace hardcoded generic PA with progressive calibration that learns from actual user conversations during first 10 turns.
steps: Remove hardcoded generic PA from state_manager.py lines 388-396
Implement progressive PA extraction using conversation analysis
Extract Purpose from first 3-5 turns using semantic clustering
Extract Scope by identifying key topics and themes
Extract Boundaries by detecting user preferences and constraints
Lock PA at turn 11 and mark as calibrated
Add telemetry to track PA evolution across turns
Test with TELOS project conversation to verify PA captures "AI governance project" as purpose

phases.name: Calculate Real Fidelity Scores
phases.description: Implement actual fidelity calculation after each response and remove all hardcoded 0.850 values from displays.
steps: After streaming response completes, embed the full response text
Calculate cosine similarity between response embedding and PA centroid
Store real fidelity score in turn data (replace None values)
Remove hardcoded 0.85 from conversation_display.py lines 1636, 2375
Update display to show actual calculated fidelity from turn data
Add fidelity calculation logging for debugging
Test that fidelity varies based on actual conversation content
Verify low fidelity scores trigger interventions

phases.name: Fix PA Display
phases.description: Replace placeholder PA text with actual extracted PA (Purpose, Scope, Boundaries) from conversation analysis.
steps: Identify where PA display pulls data in conversation_display.py
Replace placeholder text ("Establish conversation purpose", etc.) with real PA data
Format PA display to show: Purpose as bullet points, Scope as topic list, Boundaries as constraint statements
Add calibration status indicator (Calibrating turns 1-10, Locked turn 11+)
Test display shows actual extracted PA from test conversations
Verify PA updates during calibration phase (turns 1-10)
Confirm PA locks and stays stable after turn 11

phases.name: Remove Fake Displays
phases.description: Remove counterfactual display showing demo data and gray out Observatory section until real data is available.
steps: Remove counterfactual display component entirely from BETA interface
Gray out Observatory section with "Coming Soon" message
Clean up any references to counterfactual in BETA code
Update UI to show only: PA Display (with real data) and Conversation (with real fidelity)
Test that removed displays do not appear in BETA mode
Document what displays are available in BETA vs full Observatory

phases.name: Drift Detection & Intervention Logic
phases.description: Implement logic that detects when conversation drifts from PA and applies interventions to redirect.
steps: Define drift threshold (e.g., fidelity < 0.75 = drift)
Implement intervention response generation when drift detected
Intervention should redirect to PA purpose without being preachy
Add intervention telemetry (what triggered it, what response was generated)
Test with Thanksgiving conversation - should detect drift and redirect to TELOS
Verify intervention appears in conversation with visual indicator
Measure intervention effectiveness (does fidelity recover?)
Document intervention strategy and response patterns

phases.name: Integration Testing
phases.description: Test entire fixed BETA with real conversations to verify all components work together correctly.
steps: Test Case 1: TELOS project conversation (should extract TELOS PA)
Test Case 2: Drift to Thanksgiving (should detect and intervene)
Test Case 3: Extended 20-turn conversation (PA should lock at turn 11)
Test Case 4: Multiple users (each should get unique PA)
Verify all displays show real data (no placeholders, no hardcoded values)
Check telemetry logs for complete data capture
Measure fidelity variation across different conversation types
Run Playwright diagnostic script to automate regression testing
Document any bugs found and fix before completion

phases.name: Documentation & Validation
phases.description: Document all fixes made, create testing guide, and validate BETA is ready for adversarial testing.
steps: Document all code changes made with file paths and line numbers
Create BETA testing guide for manual validation
Document PA extraction algorithm and calibration process
Document intervention triggering conditions and thresholds
Create telemetry interpretation guide
Validate BETA meets success criteria (real PA, real fidelity, interventions work)
Generate final validation report showing before/after comparison
Confirm BETA is ready for adversarial compliance validation (Phase 2 of original plan)

dependencies.reason: Cannot extract PA if governance loop is not executing
Fidelity calculation requires real PA centroid, not hardcoded generic PA
Cannot display real PA until it is actually being extracted
Drift detection depends on real fidelity scores, not hardcoded values
Interventions must be enabled for drift logic to function
All displays must show real data before integration testing
Core functionality must work before comprehensive testing
UI must be clean before testing user experience
Cannot document until all fixes are tested and validated

risks.risk: PA extraction may not capture user intent accurately from first 10 turns
risks.mitigation: Implement conservative extraction with human review option. Start with explicit intent statements. Add refinement mechanism if PA seems off-target.

risks.risk: Fidelity calculation may be too sensitive or not sensitive enough
risks.mitigation: Test with diverse conversations to calibrate thresholds. Make intervention threshold configurable. Log all fidelity scores for analysis.

risks.risk: Interventions may feel preachy or disrupt conversation flow
risks.mitigation: Design intervention responses to be gentle redirects, not lectures. Test user experience with multiple intervention styles. Use natural language transitions.

risks.risk: Enabling interventions may cause unexpected side effects in existing code
risks.mitigation: Enable interventions incrementally with extensive logging. Test in isolated environment first. Have rollback plan ready.

risks.risk: Timeline may extend if PA extraction algorithm is more complex than expected
risks.mitigation: Start with simple semantic clustering approach. Can iterate and improve after basic version works. Set decision point at Day 3 of Phase 2.

risks.risk: Testing may reveal additional broken components not yet discovered
risks.mitigation: Phase 7 integration testing is designed to catch this. Budget extra time for unexpected fixes. Prioritize critical path items first.

success_criteria.criterion: Interventions are enabled and firing when drift detected
success_criteria.measurement: Thanksgiving conversation test: AI detects drift (fidelity < 0.75) and redirects to TELOS topic. Telemetry shows intervention triggered and logged.

success_criteria.criterion: Real PA extracted from user conversations
success_criteria.measurement: TELOS project conversation: PA Purpose includes "AI governance" or "TELOS project". PA is unique per user, not generic hardcoded text.

success_criteria.criterion: Real fidelity scores calculated and displayed
success_criteria.measurement: Fidelity varies across conversation (not stuck at 0.850). Drift conversation shows fidelity drop. Display shows actual calculated values from turn data.

success_criteria.criterion: PA display shows real extracted data
success_criteria.measurement: PA section displays actual Purpose/Scope/Boundaries from conversation analysis, not placeholder text like "Establish conversation purpose".
Counterfactual display completely removed from BETA. Observatory section grayed out. No demo/placeholder data visible to users.

success_criteria.criterion: PA locks at turn 11 and remains stable
success_criteria.measurement: 20-turn conversation: PA changes during turns 1-10, locks at turn 11, does not change afterward. Calibration status indicator updates correctly.

success_criteria.criterion: Complete telemetry capture for all TELOS operations
success_criteria.measurement: Every turn has logged: PA state, fidelity score, intervention decision, drift detection. No None values in critical fields. Logs are parseable and complete.
All 7 success criteria above met. Manual testing confirms TELOS governance is functioning. Stakeholder approval to proceed with adversarial validation.
